title: Devi
desc: Devi, a Nagini from the Nagaloka, performs a special pooja on an eclipse day but is distracted by Tantra, an evil Naga punished by Nagdeva.

title: I Love You Da
desc: A match fixer faces tough competition when a young player decides to fight him and make his country win.

title: Varalaru
desc: Shivshankar, a person who uses a wheelchair, tries to make his son, Vishnu, aware of his responsibilities but to no avail. Things take a turn for the worse after Vishnu tries to rape a girl.

title: Thiraipada Nagaram
desc: Youngsters in Chennai seek film industry opportunities, renting a supportive house and receiving recommendations from a film production manager, but face disagreements.

title: Semma Botha Aagathey
desc: Chellam, a boy from a poor family, is in love with a rich girl but ignores her by focusing on his career while making his parents proud by scoring the highest in the district.

title: Ettuthikkum Para
desc: When a social activist locks horns with the government, it leads to the death of his son and his friends. Later, he protects an eloped couple who are hunted by their casteist relatives.

title: Iniyavaley
desc: Prabhakar is firm on marrying only after he clears his exams and becomes a collector. When his parents fix his marriage, his protests lead to complications and he ends up marrying the bride's sister.

title: Amma Appa Cheliam
desc: Chellam, a boy from a poor family, is in love with a rich girl but ignores her by focusing on his career while making his parents proud by scoring the highest in the district.

title: Cheran Chozhan Pandian
desc: After being released from jail Cheran, Chozhan, and Pandian are determined to reform, they encounter the corrupt politician Swamy. They befriend Gayathri, Swamy's sister, leading to complications.

title: Pattayya Kelappannum Pandi Yaa
desc: Velpandiyan, a minibus driver, falls in love with Kanmani, a regular commuter of the bus. However, they face several challenges as their relationship grows further.

title: Coimbatore Mappllai
desc: Balu comes to the city for better opportunities and stays with his friend. He falls in love with Sumithra, his landlord, but her evil cousin, Mahesh, creates a rift between them.

title: Mariyathai
desc: Annamalai is a highly respected man whose son, Raja, falls in love with Radha, a music teacher. Radha manages to manipulate Raja into giving up his property.

title: Muthuramalingam
desc: A respected martial arts expert finds himself in a sticky situation during a competition that threatens his life and the pride of his community.

title: Vandi
desc: Three roommates, who are trying to make their ends meet, land in trouble due to a stolen bike that has been extensively used by robbers for executing their plans

title: Nageswary
desc: A night before her wedding, Nagaveni and her brother are assaulted and killed by her fiance, Eashwar, and his friends. However, she rises from the dead and sets out to take revenge on them.

title: Acharam
desc: Suriya, a sub-inspector, hates modern women and kills them secretly at night. When he meets Ramya, the wife of an architect, he becomes obsessed with her.

title: Vanmam
desc: Friends Radha and Chelladurai lead a carefree life. When Radha accidentally kills Chelladurai's brother-in-law, it turns them bitter foes, and a cunning man uses their enmity to his benefits
